type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: We receive or gas from Domtar stack and we use it to make precipitated Calcium Carbonate. To estimate our release we use Domtar stack analysis and by mass balance estimate what parts we used of it. So if the emissions from Domtar increase or decrease it will increase or decrease ours.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: We use phosphoric acid to clean our heat exchanger and we have improved our operation of our heat exchanger and we need to clean them less often.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: We use phosphoric acid to clean our heat exchanger and we have improved our operation of our heat exchanger and we need to clean them less often.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: We use an emission factor from test made on many carbonator stacks in our company and calculate emission based on our operating hours. Stack tests from PCC carbonators show upper range for particulate emissions is 26.2 mg/Nm3 at actual O2 conditions.Particulates of calcium hydroxide and calcium carbonate are entrained in the moist gas exiting the carbonators.  Due to the fact that the gas is saturated, SMI has been unable to test for PM2.5.  SMI assumes that TPM,  PM10 and PM2.5 are equal

comments.comment: New emission factor estimate from test done on many of or company facilities

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Our company as new emission factor based on tests from many of our facilities. The PM 2.5 and PM 10 have the same amount because the particulates of calcium hydroxide and calcium carbonate are entrained in the moist gas exiting the carbonators.  Due to the fact that the gas is saturated, our company has been unable to test for PM2.5.  Our company assumes that TPM,  PM10 and PM2.5 are equal

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
We use an emission factor from test made on many carbonator stacks in our company and calculate
emission based on our operating hours. Stack tests from PCC carbonators show upper range for
particulate emissions is 26.2 mg/Nm3 at actual O2 conditions.Particulates of calcium hydroxide and
calcium carbonate are entrained in the moist gas exiting the carbonators. Due to the fact that the gas is saturated, SMI has been unable to test for PM2.5. SMI assumes that TPM, PM10 and PM2.5 are equal

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site
